cards.name: Cast Darkness
cards.quote: The light recedes, and with it, all certainty.
cards.actionEffect: Obscure radius 1 with <sprite name="darkness">darkness and hide allied PCs.

cards.name: Cast Light
cards.quote: Even the shadowed places yield their secrets to the faithful.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="light">Reveal radius 1 and expose <sprite name="hidden">hidden enemy PCs.

cards.name: Conjure Mounts
cards.quote: From air and earth, the steeds answer the call.
cards.actionEffect: Add <sprite name="mounts">mounts to your stores.

cards.name: Courage
cards.quote: A single voice, raised in faith, can turn the tide.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="encouraged">Encourage a friendly army commander.

cards.name: Fear
cards.quote: Dread walks before the shadow like a herald.
cards.actionEffect: Inflict <sprite name="fear">Fear on an enemy character.

cards.name: Festival Night
cards.quote: Music and fire reshape the hearts of those who gather.
cards.actionEffect: Shift PC <sprite name="loyalty">loyalty based on your alignment.

cards.name: Halt
cards.quote: The road vanishes beneath their feet.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="halted">Halt an enemy non-commander character.

cards.name: Haste
cards.quote: Time itself bends to urgent purpose.
cards.actionEffect: Recover <sprite name="movement">movement points.

cards.name: Heal
cards.quote: The hurts of the road are not beyond remedy.
cards.actionEffect: Restore <sprite name="health">health to a wounded or <sprite name="poisoned">poisoned ally.

cards.name: Ice Storm
cards.quote: Winter answers to a single breath.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="frozen">Freeze enemy units in a radius.

cards.name: Invisibility
cards.quote: The unseen walker passes where armies cannot.
cards.actionEffect: Become <sprite name="hidden">invisible for several turns.

cards.name: Perceive Danger
cards.quote: The wise do not walk blind into peril.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="scout">Reveal the area around the nearest enemy army.

cards.name: Possession
cards.quote: The will is a door that opens from within.
cards.actionEffect: Possess an enemy non-commander, capturing them with magic.

cards.name: Return To Capital
cards.quote: The hearth calls louder than the road.
cards.actionEffect: Return instantly to your <sprite name="fort">capital.

cards.name: Reveal PC
cards.quote: What is hidden shall be brought into the light.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="hidden">Reveal a hidden enemy PC.

cards.name: Root
cards.quote: The earth rises to hold what the hand cannot.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="blocked">Block an enemy character.

cards.name: Scry Area
cards.quote: The seeing-stone grants glimpses beyond the horizon.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="map">Reveal a random unseen area of the map.

cards.name: Scry Artifact
cards.quote: Treasure calls to treasure across the dark.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="artifact">Reveal a hidden artifact location.

cards.name: Summon Men-at-arms
cards.quote: The ranks swell at the raising of the staff.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="army">Summon men-at-arms for a friendly commander.

cards.name: Teleport
cards.quote: The straight road is not always the visible one.
cards.actionEffect: Warp to a random unseen location.

cards.name: Voice Of The Tower
cards.quote: The whispered word unmakes what walls have guarded.
cards.actionEffect: Inflict <sprite name="despair">Despair on enemy army commanders in radius.

cards.name: Wizard's Fire
cards.quote: Flame kindled by will alone does not know mercy.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="burning">Burn enemy units in a radius.

cards.name: WizardsLaugh
cards.quote: Laughter, in the right mouth, is a blade without a hilt.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease enemy PC <sprite name="loyalty">loyalty.

cards.name: Words Of Dispair
cards.quote: A whispered doom unmakes battalions.
cards.actionEffect: Inflict casualties on an enemy army.

cards.name: You Shall Not Pass!
cards.quote: Some doors are guarded by more than stone.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="halted">Halt all enemy non-commanders at this hex.
